Description

Matthew Lawrence is a solo indie game developer, a.k.a. mattlawrdev (company). They make games in their free time, and specialize in deeply expressive experiences. Their current project is ENCHAIN, an experimental first person shooter + exploration-platformer.

History

Matthew Lawrence continues solo game development in free time for personal enrichment. Matthew received a degree in Computer Science in 2023. Before college, they self-taught themselves game development. Game jams are a common outlet for creative experiments from time to time. They continue to make small projects every now and then, but mattlawrdev is primarily focusing on ENCHAIN for the foreseeable future.
